BEATCHARACTERMOD-TONE_POLICE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Rhythm[/gold]: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Flat|Flats}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Resonance[/gold]: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Sharp|Sharps}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

BEATCHARACTERMOD-ON_THE_BEAT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

BEATCHARACTERMOD-ON_THE_BEAT.selectionSc: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
BEATCHARACTERMOD-OFFBEAT.description: At the end of your turn, if this is in your Hand, lose {Tempo:tempoIcons()}.
BEATCHARACTERMOD-OFFBEAT.title: Offbeat
